name: Roast Beef a La Stroganoff
recipeIngredient: 2 c Thinly sliced roast beef, Cooked
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook celery, onion and mushrooms in butter until tender.
2. Stir in flour and soy sauce.
3. Add bouillon; cook, stirring until thickened.
4. Stir in sour cream.
5. Add beef and heat through.
6. Serve with hot cooked rice or noodles.
